# cmccloudv2_mysql_user (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
# create mysql user with alter and create permissions on all databases & tables
resource "cmccloudv2_mysql_user" "user1" {
	instance_id = "4233c081-0f75-4d9a-83f0-3641a0da1a62"
	username  = "user1"
	password = "AaioeuroieEd343"
	hosts = [ "%" ]
	user_permissions {
		database = "*"
		table = "*"
		permissions = [ "alter", "create" ]
	}
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) Mysql instance id
- `username` (String) Mysql username

### Optional

- `hosts` (Set of String) `%` to allow all IPs, specific IP address (e.g., 192.168.1.1) or multiple IP addresses
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Mysql user password
- `user_permissions` (Block Set) List of user permissions (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--user_permissions))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--user_permissions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `user_permissions`

Required:

- `database` (String) Database name to which the permissions apply. Set it to `*` if you want to allow all databases
- `permissions` (Set of String) List of permissions (alter, create, delete, drop, insert, select, update, index, create view, trigger, event, references). Set it to `*` if you want to allow permissions
- `table` (String) Table name to which the permissions apply. Set it to `*` if you want to allow all tables
